headline: Is IDEX (IEX) Still Attractive After Recent Gains And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: If you are wondering whether IDEX at around US$208 per share is offering good value today, it helps to step back and look at the drivers behind that price before jumping to any conclusions. The stock has slipped about 1.9% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is around 0.9% and both the year to date and 1 year returns sit at 16.3%. These figures can change how the risk and reward trade off feels for existing and potential shareholders. Recent coverage has focused on IDEX as a steady...
